basic_details.job_title: ICAR CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (CIRCOT), Mumbai
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-CIRCOT is recruiting 1 Senior Research Fellow under DBT funded project.

qualification.details: Essential Qualification: Master’s Degree in Molecular Biology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, or a related discipline. Note: Candidates with 3 years Bachelor’s degree must have NET qualification and 2 years research experience (as per ICAR/DST guidelines). | Desirable Qualification: PhD in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Life Sciences with experience in molecular biology tools. | Age Limit: 35 years for male and 40 years for female (relaxation as per GOI rules: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, 10 years for PH).

how_to_apply: Fill the prescribed Application Form (attached in the notification PDF) in PDF format.
Attach all relevant documents (educational certificates, experience certificates, NET score, etc.).
Send the complete application through email to [email protected] on or before 14-07-2026 (05:30 PM).
Shortlisted candidates will be informed for the Walk-in Interview (Hybrid Mode) on 16-07-2026.
Candidates appearing physically must bring original documents, self-attested copies, and a recent passport-size photograph.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary and contractual. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Selected candidate must join immediately.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT SRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: ICAR-Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (CIRCOT), Mumbai has issued notification F.No.: A-12024/3/2026-Adm-I-CIRCOT dated 02.07.2026 for engagement of Senior Research Fellow (SRF) under the project “Nutraceutical Profiling and Optimization of Rice-Based Low-Alcoholic Beverages from North East Regions of India: Health Implications and Commercial Potential”. The position is purely contractual for 3 years or till the completion of the project. Download ICAR-CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow Walk-in Interview Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ICAR-CIRCOT is recruiting 1 Senior Research Fellow under DBT funded project.

rows.icar_central_institute_for_research_on_c: Nutraceutical Profiling and Optimization of Rice-Based Low-Alcoholic Beverages from North East Regions of India
Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (1st & 2nd year) Rs. 42,000/- + HRA (3rd year)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
ICAR-CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualification: Master’s Degree in Molecular Biology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, or a related discipline. Note: Candidates with 3 years Bachelor’s degree must have NET qualification and 2 years research experience (as per ICAR/DST guidelines). Desirable Qualification: PhD in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Life Sciences with experience in molecular biology tools. Age Limit: 35 years for male and 40 years for female (relaxation as per GOI rules: 3 years for OBC, 5 years for SC/ST, 10 years for PH).

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: Nutraceutical profiling and optimization of rice-based low-alcoholic beverages. Identification and characterization of bioactive compounds through HPLC. Identification and characterization of microbial communities using molecular biology techniques. Interpretation of results, writing research reports, and any other work assigned by PI.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply ICAR-CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Step-by-Step Process: Fill the prescribed Application Form (attached in the notification PDF) in PDF format. Attach all relevant documents (educational certificates, experience certificates, NET score, etc.). Send the complete application through email to [email protected] on or before 14-07-2026 (05:30 PM). Shortlisted candidates will be informed for the Walk-in Interview (Hybrid Mode) on 16-07-2026. Candidates appearing physically must bring original documents, self-attested copies, and a recent passport-size photograph.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The position is purely temporary and contractual. Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. Selected candidate must join immediately.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in interview date for ICAR-CIRCOT SRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview (Hybrid Mode) is scheduled for 16 July 2026 at 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Research Fellow at ICAR CIRCOT?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for SRF under the DBT-funded project.

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for ICAR CIRCOT SRF position?
faq.answer: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (1st & 2nd year) and Rs. 42,000/- + HRA (3rd year).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for ICAR CIRCOT SRF 2026?
faq.answer: Master’s Degree in Molecular Biology, Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology or related discipline (with NET for 3-year degree holders).

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for ICAR CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: 35 years for males and 40 years for females (with relaxation as per GOI rules).

faq.question: Q6. What is the last date to email application for ICAR CIRCOT SRF?
faq.answer: 14 July 2026 (by 05:30 PM) to [email protected].

faq.question: Q7. Is PhD mandatory for ICAR CIRCOT SRF post?
faq.answer: No, PhD is desirable. Master’s degree with required experience is sufficient.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the ICAR CIRCOT SRF Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: At ICAR-CIRCOT, Adenwala Road, Matunga, Mumbai – 400019.

faq.question: Q9. Is this ICAR CIRCOT SRF position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and contractual for the project duration.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for ICAR CIRCOT Senior Research Fellow 2026?
faq.answer: Send the filled application form with documents via email to [email protected] by 14-07-2026 and attend the walk-in interview on 16-07-2026.
